lab_hub.footer_1: Singularity Labs bundle experimental features of Animetix: generative and cognitive AI tools applied to the anime & manga universe.
lab_hub.footer_2: Lore generation, dubbing and voice synthesis, video analysis, 3D reconstruction, reasoning engines — each module is an actively evolving research prototype.

video.desc: Intelligent video analysis and indexing by computer vision.

visual-nexus.desc: Interconnection of vision models for holistic understanding.
visual-nexus.title: Visual Nexus

voice-lab.desc: Advanced voice synthesis and fine prosodic parameter modulation.
voice-lab.title: Voice Lab

lab_hub.subtitle: Explore the border between generative AI and pure cognition.

ai_debate_arena.explainer_text_card1: This arena pits two AIs against each other in a structured debate, testing their dialectic reasoning and argumentation skills on a given topic. Observe how they construct and defend their arguments.
ai_debate_arena.explainer_text_card2: By analyzing the debate dynamics, you can gain insights into AI logic, identify biases, and understand the nuances of machine-generated arguments, improving your own critical thinking.
ai_debate_arena.protocol_text: Debate Protocol: Two specialized LLMs engage in a multi-turn dialogue, generating arguments, counter-arguments, and rebuttals, with a third LLM acting as moderator and scoring agent.
ai_debate_arena.subtitle: Dialectic Reasoning & Argumentation
ai_debate_arena.title: AI Debate Arena

audio.guide_footer_1: Zero-shot voice cloning pipeline: a short reference audio sample is enough to condition the text-to-speech synthesis (TTS), with no dedicated training.
audio.guide_footer_2: Catalog profiles are ingested from YouTube extracts or datasets, then stored as server-side reference samples.
audio.guide_ingestion_desc: Is a voice missing from the catalog? Add it via a YouTube link: the extract is downloaded and transformed into a reusable voice profile.
audio.guide_source_desc: Choose a voice from the Seiyuu/VF catalog (click or drag-and-drop), or import your own .wav file as reference.
audio.guide_synthesis_desc: Type text (10 to 500 characters) and generate: the AI reads it with the chosen voice timbre, then you listen to the result.
audio.ingest_desc_placeholder: E.g.: French actor with a clear voice, known for voicing Sora...
audio.result_success: Your voice has been successfully synthesized.
audio.search_aria: Search for a seiyuu or a character
audio.seiyuu_roles_aria: Select or drag voice profile of {{name}}
audio.text_validation: Please enter at least 10 characters for synthesis.
audio.title: Audio Lab

cinematic.guide_concept_desc: Import a classic 2D video and the system reconstructs a 3D version, frame-by-frame, that you can explore.
cinematic.guide_footer_1: The video is sampled at 2 frames per second, then each frame undergoes a monocular depth estimation (MiDaS) to obtain scene geometry.
cinematic.guide_footer_2: The depth maps are then converted to point clouds using Gaussian Splatting, producing a timestamped volumetric frame with its point count.
cinematic.guide_results_desc: Each thumbnail shows its timestamp and number of 3D points, allowing you to assess scene density.
cinematic.guide_usage_desc: Drag your video file, click "Launch Reconstruction" and wait for processing to finish. Each reconstructed frame appears in the results grid.
cinematic.scene_ready_desc: Use the DCS engine to navigate the scene
cinematic.subtitle: Transform your 2D sequences into volumetric temporal 3D environments.
cinematic.waiting_engine_desc: Load a video sequence to start the DCS.

cognition.counterfactual_desc: Explore possible worlds of your interactions and calculate the minimum counterfactual regret.
cognition.guide_footer_1: The Cognition Hub unifies identity and decision vectors.
cognition.guide_footer_2: Data processed here helps refine neuro-symbolic recommendation models without compromising digital privacy boundaries.
cognition.hero_title: Fusion of digital identity, artificial memory, and simulation of possible futures.
cognition.imprint_desc: Manage the semantic footprint you leave on the AI and audit your preference vectors in real time.
cognition.psycho_desc: Highlight your position in the latent space of fans and the convergence of your psychographic traits.

compiler.analysis_desc: AI analyzes the execution graph and generates vectorized C code for critical similarity calculations.
compiler.guide_compile_desc: Enter a supported function (cosine_similarity, euclidean_distance, vector_norm) and run optimization: the kernel is compiled into machine code and tested immediately.
compiler.guide_concept_desc: Similarity calculations between works (cosine, Euclidean distance) are slow in pure Python. This page shows how the server accelerates them by compiling on the fly.
compiler.guide_footer_1: Real JIT compilation via Numba (@njit, fastmath): the Python numerical kernel is translated to machine code on the server, then validated on a test vector.
compiler.guide_footer_2: The C code shown on the left is illustrative — the actual mechanism is dynamic generation of Numpy/Numba kernels by the singularity-lab API.
compiler.guide_result_desc: The right panel displays compilation status, validation test output, and generated code signature. This action consumes Berrix.
compiler.subtitle: Real-time optimization of semantic microcode via SOTA 2035 JIT compilation.

counterfactual_simulator.current_reality_desc: In the main timeline, the system optimized results to maximize semantic fidelity (Fidelity: {{actualUtility}}%).
counterfactual_simulator.explainer_text_card1: This lab allows you to explore 'what-if' scenarios by simulating alternate outcomes based on different decisions or prompts. It quantifies the 'regret' of not having chosen an optimal path.
counterfactual_simulator.explainer_text_card2: By understanding counterfactual regret, you can optimize your strategies and prompts to achieve superior results in various AI interactions, from content generation to decision-making.
counterfactual_simulator.inference_analysis_desc: Counterfactual analysis reveals that using the prompt "{{whatIfQuery}}" {{regretCondition}}
counterfactual_simulator.inference_analysis_less_eff: is less effective than the current routing strategy.
counterfactual_simulator.inference_analysis_more_corr: would have allowed extracting more correlations from the Knowledge Graph.
counterfactual_simulator.initial_context: The user asked who is stronger between Goku and Saitama.
counterfactual_simulator.protocol_text: Simulation Protocol: The simulator employs Counterfactual Regret Minimization (CFR) algorithms to iteratively analyze and optimize decision trees in incomplete information games, modeling AI interactions.
counterfactual_simulator.subtitle: Explore Alternate Timelines & Regret Minimization
counterfactual_simulator.timelines_unloaded_desc: Use the left panel to simulate a "What If".
counterfactual_simulator.warning_text_part1: Warning: The simulator uses semantic reasoning models to project virtual realities.
counterfactual_simulator.warning_text_part2: The regret score is a probabilistic measure of the utility gap between two dialogue trajectories.

cove_oracle.explainer_text_card1: Imagine a super-smart detective that uses advanced logic to find hidden clues and predict future trends in massive amounts of information. That's the Cove Oracle for you.
cove_oracle.explainer_text_card2: It acts like a 'predictive mind,' sifting through all kinds of data (text, images, sounds) to guess what's coming next with incredible accuracy. This helps make really smart decisions.
cove_oracle.guide_control_desc: The AI first writes a draft (the "baseline"), then asks itself sub-questions to control each stated fact.
cove_oracle.guide_footer_1: Chain-of-Verification (CoVe) pipeline: the baseline response is decomposed into verification questions, each cross-referenced with the Neo4j knowledge graph (entities and relations).
cove_oracle.guide_footer_2: The final response is regenerated from the confirmed facts, reducing model hallucinations.
cove_oracle.guide_question_desc: Ask a lore question (anime, manga, game). The Oracle does not settle for an instinctive response: it verifies it before delivering it to you.
cove_oracle.guide_verdict_desc: Each fact is checked against the site's knowledge base, and the final response is rewritten, correcting any errors found.
cove_oracle.protocol_text: Prediction Protocol: Multi-modal data streams are fed into a distributed network of quantum-inspired processors, where probabilistic correlations are continuously updated via a self-optimizing Bayesian framework.
cove_oracle.question_placeholder: ex: Who killed Ryuko Matoi's father in Kill la Kill?
cove_oracle.submit_query_prompt: Submit a query to initiate the CoVe engine and visualize the verification graph.
cove_oracle.subtitle: Predictive Consciousness & Pattern Detection

diagnostics.error: Failed to compute neural metrics. Please retry.
diagnostics.explainer_text_card1: This tool provides deep insights into the internal states of the model during inference. By analyzing entropy distributions and logit lens trajectories, you can identify how the model forms predictions.
diagnostics.explainer_text_card2: Use these visualizations to uncover potential biases, debug unexpected outputs, and refine your prompt strategies for maximum model reliability.
diagnostics.guide_entropy_desc: Each bar measures the model's hesitation on a token. A low bar means it is confident, a high bar means it hesitates between several possible next tokens.
diagnostics.guide_footer_1: Real inference diagnostics: prompt is sent to the labs/diagnostics endpoint which calculates entropy of the output distribution per token, a global confidence score, and the logit lens trajectory through model layers.
diagnostics.guide_footer_2: Charts visualize these metrics as-is, without post-processing.
diagnostics.guide_heatmap_desc: The 'logit lens' map shows how prediction sharpens layer after layer. Useful to spot biases or understand an unexpected output.
diagnostics.guide_prompt_desc: Type a phrase and run diagnostics: the language model analyzes it token by token and shows you what happens inside during inference.
diagnostics.protocol_text: Measurement Protocol: Probability amplitudes are calculated via the Animetix cognitive solver. Any observation modifies the user's initial state of consciousness vector.
diagnostics.subtitle: Advanced entropy analysis and cognitive confidence mapping for neural networks.
diagnostics.title: Neural Diagnostics

diorama.download_format_note: Download your models in .PLY or .USDZ format for external viewing.
diorama.no_creations_desc: You have not generated any dioramas in the Nexus yet.
diorama.subtitle: Visualize your AI-generated 3D volumetric reconstructions

latent.click_prompt: Click on a glowing point in space to analyze it
latent.guide_concept_desc: Each glowing point is an anime, a manga, or a character. Its position reflects how the AI understands the work: two close points are similar.
latent.guide_filters_desc: Change domain (anime, manga, characters) and analysis axis (thematic, visual, scenario) to reload the map from another angle.
latent.guide_footer_1: Exploratory catalog visualization: high-dimensional embeddings are projected into 3 dimensions then rendered as an interactive point cloud (Plotly scatter3d).
latent.guide_footer_2: Spatial proximity translates semantic similarity of vectors; colors group detected clusters or categories.
latent.guide_nav_desc: Rotate the map with the mouse, zoom with the wheel, then click on a point to open its analysis sheet in the right panel.
latent.proximity_desc: This work is positioned in space according to its {{type}} characteristics. Its vector position indicates a strong semantic affinity with surrounding clusters.

liquid_nn.comparison_note: Unlike standard networks, LNNs process data as a continuous stream, allowing dynamic adaptation to the temporal variability of Animetix's multimodal signals.
liquid_nn.explainer_text_card1: Think of this as a brain that flows. Unlike standard AI that processes information in rigid steps, Liquid Neural Networks adapt on the fly to incoming data, just like biological neurons.
liquid_nn.explainer_text_card2: This flexibility makes them perfect for analyzing data that changes over time, like video streams or sensors, ensuring consistent and stable performance even when input is noisy or unpredictable.
liquid_nn.guide_concept_desc: Unlike classic AI which processes information in fixed stages, a "liquid" neural network evolves continuously over time, like real biological neurons.
liquid_nn.guide_footer_1: Liquid neural network simulation: the state of the 4 neurons follows the differential equation dx/dt = -x/τ + f(Wx + Iu)(A - x), solved by Runge-Kutta 4th-order (RK4) numerical integration.
liquid_nn.guide_footer_2: The graph visualizes the state trajectory calculated server-side and returned by the liquid-nn endpoint.
liquid_nn.guide_signal_desc: Generate a random input signal then launch integration: each curve on the graph shows how the activation of a neuron reacts to this signal over time.
liquid_nn.guide_step_desc: The dt slider adjusts simulation granularity. A small step yields more precise curves, a large step speeds up calculation at the cost of precision.
liquid_nn.protocol_text: Integration Protocol: The state dynamics are solved using a Runge-Kutta 4th order (RK4) numerical integrator, mapping continuous input signals to neural activations.
liquid_nn.solver_note: Le solveur utilise une intégration numérique de Runge-Kutta d'ordre 4 (RK4) pour garantir la stabilité des états neuronaux même avec des pas temporels (dt) élevés.
liquid_nn.subtitle: Neuromorphic Engineering
liquid_nn.title: Liquid Neural Networks

manga.guide_cleaner_desc: Erases text from bubbles to get a blank page, ready for your own text or a new translation.
manga.guide_concept_desc: Import a manga page and let the AI clean or translate it, without touching the drawings.
manga.guide_footer_1: The page is sent to the backend which detects text bubbles, extracts content via OCR, then erases lettering via inpainting to produce the 'clean' version.
manga.guide_footer_2: For translation, recognized text is translated into the target language then reinserted in bubbles, and the final image is returned base64-encoded.
manga.guide_translator_desc: Choose a target language and the page is translated directly inside the bubbles. Compare versions with the Original, Clean, and Translated tabs.
manga.title: Manga Lab

manga_voice.casting_desc: Choose a voice from the database or load your own clip.
manga_voice.character_ready: The character {{character}} is ready to speak.
manga_voice.guide_casting_desc: Choose a voice actor from the catalog (filterable by JP/FR language) or load your own WAV/MP3 clip as reference voice.
manga_voice.guide_footer_1: Zero-shot voice cloning: text and a reference audio sample are sent to the manga-voice endpoint, which conditions voice synthesis on this timbre without prior training.
manga_voice.guide_footer_2: Catalog profiles provide the sample automatically; the output is refined via RVC v2 conversion.
manga_voice.guide_result_desc: Listen to the dubbing in the built-in player: ideal for giving voice to a manga page or testing a casting.
manga_voice.guide_script_desc: Write the line the character should say, then run generation: the chosen voice speaks your text.
manga_voice.script_placeholder: Enter the text that {{character}} should say...
manga_voice.script_placeholder_select: Select a voice actor from the left menu first...
manga_voice.subtitle: Bring your pages to life with zero-shot AI dubbing and instant voice cloning.

multiverse.guide_catalog_desc: All created universes are kept. Toggle to Catalog view to browse them as a list.
multiverse.guide_creation_desc: Drag a genre seed from the Genesis box directly onto the map. A new universe is synthesized in seconds.
multiverse.guide_footer_1: Universe synthesis generates coherent lore (cosmology, characters) via LLM and persists it in the Neo4j graph.
multiverse.guide_footer_2: The Nexus Map displays this graph — nodes and semantic links — and resynchronizes after each generation.
multiverse.guide_map_desc: Each bubble on the Nexus Map is a genre or a universe. Click on a universe to read its cosmology and discover its characters.
multiverse.no_cosmology: No cosmological description available for this universe.
multiverse.no_universe_filters: No synthetic universe matches the selected filters

offline_manga.clear_all_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete all downloaded chapters?
offline_manga.empty_subtitle: Browse the catalog to download chapters and read them without an internet connection.
offline_manga.subtitle: Local storage manager & Offline reading
offline_manga.title: Offline Manga

quantum.born_desc: The measurement forced the system to collapse out of its superposition to validate (or reject) the observable "{{theme}}". Entangled themes remain influenced by this collapse.
quantum.guide_collapse_desc: When you select a genre (e.g. SHONEN) and run a measurement, the AI forces your probabilities to settle. This is the "wave function collapse" of your preferences.
quantum.guide_footer_1: Preference simulation inspired by quantum formalism: the backend calculates a probability for the chosen theme, deduces a binary result (positive or negative collapse) and returns the displayed amplitudes vector.
quantum.guide_footer_2: JIT and Plasticity settings modulate this calculation server-side — this is a probabilistic tastes model, not a quantum computer.
quantum.guide_superposition_desc: For our AI, your tastes are not fixed boxes. You are in a "superposition" state: you potentially like everything at once until a decision is made.
quantum.guide_why_desc: This allows the AI to model human uncertainty and discover "invisible links" between genres that seem completely unrelated on the surface.
quantum.quote: "Uncertainty is the foundation of digital creativity."
quantum.subtitle: User preference modeling via state superposition and wave function collapse.
quantum.theory_desc: The AI processes your tastes not as fixed labels, but as probabilities in superposition.

seiyuu.guide_footer_1: The catalog combines a Hugging Face dataset and voices ingested from YouTube, indexed with language, roles and description.
seiyuu.guide_footer_2: The ingestion pipeline downloads the audio, isolates the vocal band (80 Hz - 8,000 Hz) and cuts a 10s silence-free sample.
seiyuu.guide_ingest_desc: Add a new voice from a YouTube video (30 Bx). The AI extracts, cleans, and indexes the sample for you.
seiyuu.guide_listen_desc: Each profile contains an audio sample. Press Play to instantly check the vocal signature.
seiyuu.guide_search_desc: Type the name of a voice actor or character, then filter by language (Japanese, French) and profile origin.
seiyuu.ingest_cost_desc: — The AI downloads the audio, isolates vocal frequencies (80Hz - 8000Hz) and cuts a 10s sample without silence.
seiyuu.ingest_def_placeholder: E.g. French actor with a clear voice, known for dubbing Sora...
seiyuu.ingest_error: An error occurred during audio download or processing.
seiyuu.ingest_required: Name and YouTube URL/query are required.
seiyuu.ingest_success: The voice of '{{name}}' was successfully ingested and cleaned!
seiyuu.no_desc: No additional description for this voice.
seiyuu.search_placeholder: Search by voice actor or character name...
seiyuu.subtitle: Explore cult voices (Seiyuus & Voice Actors) and ingest new voices on the fly.
seiyuu.try_youtube_ingest: Try initiating an ingestion from YouTube!

singularity.subtitle: Centralized monitoring interface for advanced cognitive models orchestration.

soundscape.desc: The AI first analyzes objects and actions present in your video (via Video-LLaVA) to build a semantically coherent sound prompt.
soundscape.guide_ambient_desc: An ambient audio track is generated and delivered next to your video: listen to it directly in the player.
soundscape.guide_analysis_desc: The AI looks at the frames and identifies objects, locations, and actions to understand what soundscape matches them.
soundscape.guide_footer_1: Two-step pipeline: Video-LLaVA describes the visual content of the video, and this description serves as prompt for AudioLDM for latent diffusion audio generation.
soundscape.guide_footer_2: The result is a text-to-audio ambient track returned as URL by the soundscape endpoint.
soundscape.guide_video_desc: Load a silent or poorly soundtracked video clip. This is the only thing to provide: no prompt to write.
soundscape.subtitle: Visual analysis-based AI AudioLDM soundscape generation.

spatial.desc1: Reconstruct 3D geometry from a 2D image using monocular models.
spatial.desc2: NEW: '3D Model Generation' uses Gaussian Splatting AI to create a complete manipulable object.
spatial.guide_depth_desc: The AI estimates the distance of each pixel and produces a depth map, as if it saw the image in relief.
spatial.guide_footer_1: Monocular depth estimation and 3D reconstruction (GLB mesh, Gaussian Splatting) from a single image.
spatial.guide_footer_2: The generated model is rendered in an interactive WebGL viewer and archived in the 3D gallery.
spatial.guide_model_desc: In one click, the image becomes a complete 3D object that you can rotate with the mouse and find in your gallery.
spatial.guide_source_desc: Load any 2D image (character, background, object). This is the starting point of the whole analysis.

author.body: Animetix is an independent project designed and developed by an anime and AI-engineering enthusiast. It evolves continuously, with new game modes and new Labs added regularly.
author.title: The author

about.intro: Animetix (Anime Archetype Engine) is an interactive platform where AI meets anime culture: games, creative labs, and knowledge exploration.

mission.body: Animetix explores the world of anime and manga through artificial intelligence: guessing a character in 20 questions, solving narrative riddles, generating visual and audio creations. The goal is to make discovering anime culture both playful and intelligent.
mission.title: Our mission

tech.body: The platform combines an AI reasoning engine, a graph knowledge base (Neo4j), semantic vector search, and generative models (image, voice, text). Logic games stay free; GPU/AI features use credits called Berrix, earned by playing and watching rewarded ads — no purchase required.
tech.title: The technology

about.title: About Animetix

contact.intro: A question, a bug, a request about your personal data, or a partnership? Write to us — we answer every message.
contact.privacy_note: Your messages are handled in accordance with our
contact.title: Contact us

privacy.intro: This policy explains what personal data Animetix collects, why, and how we protect it — including our use of advertising cookies.

s_ads.p1: This site displays ads served by Google AdSense. Google and its partners use cookies to serve ads based on your visits to this site and other websites.
s_ads.p2: Advertising cookies (notably the DoubleClick cookie) let Google and its partners personalize ads. You can opt out of personalized advertising via Google Ads Settings (adssettings.google.com), or decline third-party cookies at www.aboutads.info/choices.
s_ads.p3: In the European Economic Area, a consent banner records your choice before any non-essential advertising cookie is set. You can change or withdraw this consent at any time from the site settings.
s_ads.title: Cookies and advertising (Google AdSense)

s_data.p1: When you create an account, we process your email address and an authentication identifier (via Google Identity / Firebase). As you browse, we store your game preferences, match history, Berrix balance, and the content you generate in the Labs.
s_data.p2: Technical data (IP address, device type, pages visited) is recorded for security, rate limiting, and audience measurement.
s_data.title: Data we collect

s_rights.p1: Under the GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict, port, and object to the processing of your personal data. You can exercise these rights, or withdraw your consent, by contacting us at the address below.
s_rights.p2: We keep your data for as long as your account is active, then for the applicable legal retention period. You can request account deletion at any time.
s_rights.title: Your rights (GDPR)

s_third.p1: We rely on processors that handle certain data on our behalf: Google AdSense (advertising and rewarded ads), Google/Firebase (authentication), and AI inference providers for the Labs features. Each applies its own privacy policy. We do not sell your personal data.
s_third.title: Third-party services

privacy.title: Privacy Policy

library.empty_subtitle: Add manga to your library from the explorer to organize them and track your reading.
library.title: Manga Library

maintenance.default_desc: Animetix is taking a technical break to come back stronger. Thanks for your patience!
maintenance.staff_banner: Maintenance mode active - only admins can see the site

media.character.no_description: Nexus archives have not yet indexed the full biography of this subject.
media.character.not_found_desc: They seem to have been lost in the latent space...
media.detail.author: Author
media.detail.no_synopsis: No synopsis available in the Nexus.
media.staff.biography_loading: Biography currently syncing with production servers.
media.staff.consensus_desc: This artist's data is validated by the semantic consensus protocol.
media.staff.not_found_desc: This record seems to have been purged from the Graph.

personalization.info_text: Your UI evolves dynamically based on your behavior. Manual mode allows you to "lock" a specific archetype, while Auto mode lets the system drift naturally.
personalization.title: Hybrid Control

search.expert.auth_error: This mode uses AI (GPU) and costs Berrix. Please log in to start an analysis.
search.expert.idle_desc: The 5th generation AI is waiting for your instructions.
search.expert.payment_error: Analysis denied. Please check your Berrix balance (this AI mode consumes them) and try again.
search.expert.placeholder: Ask a deep question about a universe, relationship, or story arc...
search.hub.engine_desc: Enter a description to scan the clip database.
search.hub.footer_graph: All entities are linked via Neo4j, enabling the discovery of thematic correlations between anime and manga.
search.hub.footer_rag: Unified search combines MAL/AniList metadata with image analysis via Computer Vision.
search.hub.footer_temporal: Temporal indexing allows for direct frame searches within episodes.
search.hub.visual_placeholder: Describe a visual scene or a specific moment...

settings.adsHint: Disabling ads also pauses passive Bx mining.

achievements.subtitle: Your legend is written with each discovered secret.
achievements.title: 📜 Achievements Grimoire

club.event_desc_placeholder: Explain the concept, schedule, or prerequisites for this event...
club.event_title_placeholder: e.g., Shonen Jump Scan 125 review night
club.events_desc: Discover and join events organized by the club.
club.no_description: No description available for this club.
club.no_events: No events are currently scheduled for this club.

club_event.action_error: Action not possible. Are you a member of the club?
club_event.chat_placeholder: Ask questions or discuss the concept...
club_event.unregistered_success: You are no longer participating in this event.
club_event.welcome_chat: Welcome to the event! Feel free to ask your questions here.

collection.empty_gallery: Your gallery is empty. Explore the Archetypist!

dashboard.no_following: You are not following anyone yet.
dashboard.title: Community Space

debate.agent_anti_desc: ANTI Agent: Provides a reasoned contradiction.
debate.agent_judge_desc: JUDGE Agent: Synthesizes and delivers the final verdict.
debate.agent_pro_desc: PRO Agent: Defends a favorable thesis.
debate.agents_consulting: Agents are consulting the Knowledge Graph...
debate.arena_waiting_desc: Configure a duel to watch the AI debate.
debate.dpo_generation_desc: Each debate generates a training pair (Chosen/Rejected) to refine the neutrality of future models.
debate.game_theory_desc: Nash equilibrium is sought between arguments to guarantee the fairest final synthesis.
debate.knowledge_grounding_desc: Agents use Agentic RAG to source their arguments directly from the semantic lore base.
debate.subtitle: Orchestrate semantic debates between specialized agents based on Knowledge Graph facts.
debate.topic_placeholder: e.g., Is the ending of the work consistent with Eren's development?

discovery.no_nexus: No active Nexus in this sector
discovery.private_hint: Private clubs require an invitation or validation by a circle officer.
discovery.subtitle: Join a community or create your own.

feed.empty_feed: The feed is empty... Be the first to fuse!
feed.subtitle: Discover community Nexus creations.
feed.trends_desc: The most popular fusions are automatically pushed to the Animetix global Lore Graph, creating new community-validated narrative canon.

feedback.no_feedback: You have not submitted feedback to the AI yet.
feedback.subtitle: View your interactions and help us refine system intelligence.
feedback.title: AI FEEDBACK HISTORY
feedback.vote_instruction: Use the vote buttons during your next interactions!

friends.no_followers_desc: Play, create fusions, and climb the leaderboard to attract followers!
friends.no_following: You are not following anyone yet.
friends.no_following_desc: Explore profiles and start following other players!
friends.subtitle: Manage your subscriptions and followers.

nexus.subtitle: Visualization of your semantic footprint and narrative biases deduced by AI.
nexus.warning_1: Warning: Neuro-symbolic deductions are based on stochastic models resolved in real time.
nexus.warning_2: Archetype drift is recalculated after each forge or debate session.
nexus.z3_desc: Formal constraints deduced from your interactions.

social.hub.empty_state: Nothing to display here right now.
social.hub.subtitle: Manage your connections, discover new heroes and stay informed.
social.hub.title: SOCIAL HUB
social.leaderboard.empty: The pantheon is still empty. Be the first to enter.
social.leaderboard.subtitle: The legends who decoded the most secrets.
social.neuro.deduced_via: Deduced via semantic analysis of recent feedback.
social.neuro.guide_engrams_desc: These are the "rules" the AI has deduced about you (e.g., "You prefer solitary heroes"). You can see these rules on the right and decide whether to keep or delete them.
social.neuro.guide_reset_desc: If you feel the AI is wrong about you or you want to start fresh to change your archetype, use the "RESET" button at the top left.
social.neuro.guide_what_desc: This page is your "Cognitive Control Panel". Every time you interact with Animetix, our AI tries to understand your tastes, values and habits.
social.neuro.signal_desc: Adjust the weight of each interaction or revoke obsolete signals.
social.neuro.subtitle: Manage logical rules deduced by the AI and control your cognitive footprint.
social.neuro.trust_desc: You have full control over what the Z3 solver deduces from your interactions. You can reset your logic profile at any time.
social.neuro.warning_line1: Warning: Neuro-symbolic deductions are based on stochastic models resolved in real time.
social.neuro.warning_line2: The logic profile is synchronized with your Archetype Nexus.
social.notifications.subtitle: Your recent interactions
social.offline.connection_error: Connection error with the sync server.
social.offline.empty_table: No games pending. Use the "Simulate Local Game" button to add some.
social.offline.subtitle: Visualize and reconcile your local game sessions.
social.opendata.empty: No datasets available for direct download at the moment.
social.opendata.hf_expert_desc: Expert training dataset (SFT) for Otaku reasoning models, written in French.
social.opendata.hf_gold_desc: Gold standard dataset (ground truth) for evaluating model accuracy, entity extraction and RAG pipelines.
social.opendata.subtitle: Our public datasets — direct download or on Hugging Face.
social.opendata.title: OPEN DATA PORTAL
social.profile.mal_hint: Update your MAL list by reading your manga.
social.profile.tracker_desc: Link your accounts to automatically sync your manga reading progress.
social.transparency.audit_footnote: Compliance = share of evaluated interactions not blocked by the guardrail. Hallucination = share of responses flagged by automatic evaluation.
social.transparency.chart_hint: The curve will appear once several evaluation cycles have been recorded.
social.transparency.cta_desc: Every interaction with the AI strengthens the shared knowledge base. Through the DPO protocol (Direct Preference Optimization), your choices guide the Champion model's learning.
social.transparency.ethics_2: AI models are primarily Open Source.
social.transparency.subtitle: Discover how your interactions shape Animetix's brain. We believe in open, auditable AI aligned with its community.
social.transparency.vs_footnote: Champion runs on Qwen3.5-9B: a compact model hosted on our own GPU, specialized in anime/manga through continuous DPO fine-tuning. The giants above dominate general benchmarks — our bet is specialization, not size.
social.transparency.vs_subtitle: Animetix's base model versus the market's best open-source LLMs

daily.subtitle: One target, multiple ways to find it.
daily.title: DAILY CHALLENGES
